violations.text: All Foods in the open air cooler were observed above 41 degrees. All foods were disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

Open Air Cooler was not in good repair. Unit was observed above 60 degrees. All food inside was observed between 58-62 degrees. PIC disposed of all foods. Unit to not be used until able to maintain ambient temperature of 41 degrees or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

Various foods were observed held at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods recently came out of temperature. The unit was adjusted and food was rearranged to allow food to rapidly cool. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
